name: IonQ, Inc.
summary: IonQ, Inc. is a quantum platform company that develops and sells trapped-ion quantum computing hardware, quantum networking, quantum sensing, and quantum security products. The company sells access to quantum computers via cloud and on-premises deployments, and provides maintenance and support services. IonQ uses barium and ytterbium ions as qubits, targeting commercial and government customers across multiple sectors including defense, aerospace, automotive, and finance.
